revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:2O]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:2O]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:2O]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:2O]]</includeonly>
#redirect[[:en:Template:2O]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:2O]]</includeonly>
#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects 2]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:2O]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects 2]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects 2]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects 2]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects 2
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:2O]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{ hmbox | class = stuck | image =Finland road sign 189 (1994–2020).svg | message = 2nd opinion requested | extra = {{{reason|{{{1|}}}}}} }}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- place category and language links on the /doc sub-page, not here --> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=2O here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
